zh.Gartlie, Aberdeen, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agatha於大約1171年出生在英國英格蘭爾加特利時，她的父親Walter de Berkeley36歲，母親Eva mac Uhtred22歲。她於大約1192年與Humphrey de Berkeley在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1200年在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾享年30歲。

zh-hans.Gartlie, Aberdeen, Scotland: 苏格兰阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agatha于大约1171年出生在英国英格兰爾加特利时，她的父亲Walter de Berkeley36岁，母亲Eva mac Uhtred22岁。她于大约1192年与Humphrey de Berkeley在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1200年在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Agatha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Agnes   and   Agatha .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agatha was born about 1171, in Gatley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Walter de Berkeley, was 36 and her mother, Eva mac Uhtred, was 22. She married Humphrey de Berkeley about 1192, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1200, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agatha est née environ 1171, à Gatley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter de Berkeley, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Eva mac Uhtred, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey de Berkeley environ 1192, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1200, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agatha um 1171 in Gatley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter de Berkeley 36 und ihre Mutter Eva mac Uhtred 22. Sie hat um 1192 in Scotland Humphrey de Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1200 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha è nata il circa 1171 nel Gatley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Walter de Berkeley, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Eva mac Uhtred, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Humphrey de Berkeley circa 1192, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1200, nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agathaが約1171年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアガトリーで生まれた時，父Walter de Berkeleyは36歳，母Eva mac Uhtredは22歳であった。約1192年にスコットランドでHumphrey de Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1200年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agatha(이)가 대략 1171년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 가틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter de Berkeley(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva mac Uhtred(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1192년 스컷랜드에서 Humphrey de Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha nasceu aproximadamente 1171, em Gatley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter de Berkeley, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Eva mac Uhtred, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Humphrey de Berkeley aproximadamente 1192, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1200, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agatha родилась около 1171 г. в местности гатли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Walter de Berkeley было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva mac Uhtred, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey de Berkeley около 1192 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1200 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agatha nació aproximadamente 1171, en Gatley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter de Berkeley, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Eva mac Uhtred, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Humphrey de Berkeley aproximadamente 1192, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1200, en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años.
